body.title: CLOSED: Rename hebbian_bridge to coactivation_counter + docstring fix
body.result: coactivation_counter.py created; hebbian_bridge.py replaced with re-export shim; test_hebbian_bridge.py updated to reload canonical module; 4496 tests green. Commit 50f3d2df.
body.description:
Pass-2 area_2 finding: hebbian_bridge.py is misnamed — it's a scalar co-activation counter, not Hebbian pairwise edge weight update. Rename module with back-compat shim; update 3 docstrings to clarify the distinction.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/hebbian_bridge.py (rename to coactivation_counter.py + shim), wild_igor/igor/cognition/basal_ganglia.py (docstring), wild_igor/igor/cognition/consolidation.py (docstring)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code
**Scope boundary:** IN — rename + shim + 3 docstring updates. OUT — implementing true Hebbian pairwise updates (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** Existing tests pass with shim; grep confirms no remaining incorrect 'Hebbian weight update' docstrings in the three files.
**Pass condition:** `python -c "from wild_igor.igor.cognition import coactivation_counter"` succeeds; `from wild_igor.igor.cognition import hebbian_bridge` still works via shim.
